article.title: Preparing for System Design interviews? 👀
article.content:
## Built an Interactive System Design Learning Platform **SystemDecoder** 🚀

An interactive platform to visualize and simulate scalable systems instead of just memorizing diagrams.

### Explore architectures like:
- Netflix
- WhatsApp
- Uber
- Kafka
- Payment Systems

Learn distributed systems, backend flows, scaling concepts, and more interactively.

🔗 https://www.systemdecoder.com

💻 Best experienced on desktop/laptop

![snapester-export-1779040659520.png](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/990c8b7e-6afa-4c17-b9c1-c95153f5ab40_1779819682.2597635.png)


![Screenshot 2026-05-26 at 11.45.10 PM.png](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/983d7f89-de27-4448-8335-01177a8cc2bc_1779819637.1537206.png)

![Screenshot 2026-05-26 at 11.46.20 PM.png](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/fb8bb4ec-29f8-4008-89f4-601ddf762a7f_1779819651.1953335.png)

post.content: Really good and intuitive way to learn and play with system designs

If you have any confusion related to architecture and how flow runs.
Go through this website, it is really helpful in understanding the flow and architecture easily, you can test as well like load balancing and all other things.

Go through this website
Cool way to learn HLD. Using it now for my prep!!
Really helpful for HLD preparation. Amazing visualization and content! Definately gonna try it
A clean way to learn system design visually. Nice work👏🏻
